flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Mid-State Technical College fell 42% between 2006 and 2009 (49.5% → 28.6%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Mid-State Technical College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.4k → $5.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Mid-State Technical College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.4k → $7.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mid-State Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3% → 0.0%).
